title: Intensely Smoky Tunisian Lentil Stew
description: A garlicky, creamy, and festive Tunisian dish featuring brown lentils and a deep smoky flavor, perfect for a cold winter night, this vegan-friendly stew is cooked to perfection in a traditional cazuela.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cazuela over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 5 minutes, until softened.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots and cook for 5 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the brown lentils, canned diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, until the lentils are tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
